home.meta_title: S. van Wijk Solutions | Modern Websites & Custom Development
home.meta_description: S. van Wijk Solutions builds ultra-modern, fast, and SEO-optimised websites for businesses across the Netherlands.

hero.sub: Your digital business card deserves more than a template. We create high-performance websites that convert, impress, and grow.

expertise.title: Our Expertise
expertise.sub: Everything you need for a dominant online presence.
expertise.c1_text: Existing website due for a refresh? We modernise it while preserving your SEO value.
expertise.c2_text: A brand-new website, fully custom-built around your brand, audience, and goals.
expertise.c3_text: A unique, professional logo that fits your brand — delivered in all common file formats (PNG, SVG, PDF).
expertise.c4_text: We build the technical foundation so your business is instantly findable on Google.

spotlight.title: What clients experience
spotlight.sub: A recent project — and what the client has to say about it.
spotlight.hint: Move your mouse over the site to scroll through it
spotlight.quote: Sem really thought along with us and gave honest advice on what actually adds value. Not a standard template, but a site that fits us perfectly.

blog_preview.title: Tips & insights from our blog
blog_preview.sub: Practical articles about websites, SEO, and growing online.
blog_preview.p1_text: A slow website costs you customers. Discover the most common causes and how to fix them.
blog_preview.p2_title: SEO basics for SMEs in 7 steps
blog_preview.p2_text: No technical jargon. We explain what SEO is and which concrete steps you can take today to rank higher.
blog_preview.p3_title: SMEs in Westland: how to grow online
blog_preview.p3_text: Local competition is getting fiercer. Practical tips for entrepreneurs in the Westland region to stand out online.

garanties.title: Why choose S. van Wijk Solutions?
garanties.sub: No empty words — concrete guarantees you can count on.
garanties.g1_text: Not happy? We keep refining until it's right. No extra costs.
garanties.g2_text: We deliver on time. Always. If we agree on a deadline, we stick to it.
garanties.g3_text: No surprises afterwards. Clear pricing, honest advice, and direct contact.
garanties.g4_text: Every website is guaranteed to look perfect on mobile, tablet, and desktop.
garanties.g5_text: Technical SEO, fast load times, and correct structure — included as standard.
garanties.g6_text: Direct contact with Sem — no call centre, no middlemen.

cta_banner.title: Ready for a website that works?
cta_banner.text: Get a free, tailored concept today — in your inbox within 5 working days.

diensten.meta_description: See all services from S. van Wijk Solutions: websites, redesigns, SEO, custom development, and maintenance.

hero.title: What we build for you
hero.sub: From a business website to a converting redesign — we always deliver quality on measure.

intro.title: Custom-built. Always. Without exception.
intro.p1: We don't believe in one-size-fits-all. Every project starts with a conversation: what are your goals, who is your audience, and what should the website achieve? Only then do we start building.
intro.p2: The result? A website that not only looks great, but actually works for your business.

services.s1_text: A professional, fast, and SEO-optimised website that represents your business and turns visitors into customers.
services.s2_text: Already have a website but it's time for a fresh look? We modernise your existing site while preserving its SEO value.
services.s3_text: Technical SEO, speed optimisation, and on-page improvements so you rank higher on Google than the competition.
services.s4_text: High-converting landing pages for campaigns or product launches. Focused on one goal: conversion.
services.s5_text: A strong logo is the foundation of your brand. We design a unique, professional logo that fits your business and audience.
services.s6_text: Monthly maintenance, updates, security patches, and direct support. Starting at €37.95 per month.

process.title: From idea to live website
process.sub: A clear and transparent process in four steps.
process.p1_text: We discuss your wishes, audience, and competitors. No assumptions — only your input.
process.p2_text: Our team creates a custom design. Feedback is always welcome — we keep refining until you're 100% satisfied.
process.p3_text: Clean code, fast load times, and optimised for all devices. SEO foundation built in.
process.p4_text: Once approved, the site goes live. We guide the launch and are ready for support afterwards.

cta_banner.title: Ready to get started?
cta_banner.text: Request a free website concept today. In your inbox within 5 working days.

over_ons.meta_title: About Us | S. van Wijk Solutions
over_ons.meta_description: Get to know S. van Wijk Solutions — founded by Sem van Wijk. Passionate about code, design, and client success.

hero.title:
The story behind
S. van Wijk Solutions
hero.sub: Driven by a passion for code, design, and our clients' success.

mission.title: We believe every business deserves a great website.
mission.p1: S. van Wijk Solutions was founded on a simple belief: too many businesses have a website that holds them back instead of helping them grow. Slow load times, outdated design, and poor SEO cost businesses customers every day.
mission.p2: With over 5 years of experience, we fix that. With custom code, attention to detail, and a personal approach, we build websites that truly perform — and deliver customers.
mission.p3_prefix: Want to get in touch directly? Send an email to
mission.v1_text: No quick fixes, only durable, clean code.
mission.v2_text: Direct contact with our team — always.
mission.v3_text: Websites built to convert and grow.

brand_band.title: One consistent point of contact for every project
brand_band.text: No anonymous agency, no call centre. At S. van Wijk Solutions you have direct contact with the person building your website — from the first idea to launch and everything after.

nederland.title: We build websites for businesses across the Netherlands
nederland.p1: Based in the Westland region, we work with clients throughout the Netherlands. Distance is never an obstacle — we serve businesses from north to south, east to west.
nederland.p2: Everything works online and in person: from the first introductory call to final delivery. Flexible, efficient, and personal.
nederland.img_alt: Aerial photo of a Dutch city with digital connections
